name: Justine's Lemon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour and powdered sugar.
2. Cut in the butter and lemon rind until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Press the dough into a 13 x 9 x 2 inch (30 x 23 x 5 cm) baking dish that has been sprayed with cooking spray.
4. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes or until lightly browned.
5. In another bowl, beat the eggs until light and creamy.
6. Gradually add the granulated sugar, beating well after each addition.
7. Stir in the lemon juice and then fold in the flour and baking powder.
8. Pour the lemon mixture over the baked crust.
9. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 25 minutes or until set.
10. Dust with powdered sugar, allow to cool completely, and cut into bars.
